message:
feat(test): add BackendKind/Selection and TailerMode/StreamingHealth proptest coverage

- proptest_wezterm: add arb_backend_kind(), arb_backend_selection() strategies
  with serde roundtrip, snake_case format, display consistency, and compatibility
  skip_serializing_if tests (30→39 tests)
- proptest_tailer: add arb_tailer_mode(), arb_streaming_health() strategies with
  serde roundtrips, snake_case format, display consistency, JSON key structure,
  and clone tests (42→49 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
